Title: Client creates a new review

2. Click on the "Create Review" button.
3. Fill in the form with the provided data.
4. Submit the form.
Expected Result: A new Recensione object is created with the provided details.

Title: Client creates a new complaint
Preconditions: Client has a product to complain about.

- descrizione: The product is of poor quality.

2. Click on the "Create Complaint" button.
3. Fill in the form with the provided data.
4. Submit the form.
Expected Result: A new Segnalazione object is created with the provided details.

Title: Vendor creates a new preferred customer
Preconditions: Vendor has a customer to add as a preferred customer.
Test Data:
- cliente: Clienti object with name: Jane Doe, cognome: Doe, email: jane.doe@example.com
- voto: 4
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the customer management page.
2. Click on the "Create Preferred Customer" button.
3. Select the customer from the dropdown.
4. Set the voto value to 4.
5. Submit the form.
Expected Result: A new VenditorePreferito object is created with the provided details.

PROJECT OVERVIEW:
The system manages users, vendors, products, and customer feedback. Users can create customer accounts, while vendors can create vendor accounts and manage their products. Customers can provide reviews and report issues, and vendors can create preferred customers. Notifications are managed for new products and promotions.
